# aura-recruit-demo

> Demo recruitment platform built with Vue 3, TypeScript, and Vite. Showcases modern candidate management and job board UI.

## Project

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/aura-recruit-demo)
- [Website](https://cocodedk.github.io/aura-recruit-demo/)
- [Author](https://cocode.dk)

## Source

- [Components](https://github.com/cocodedk/aura-recruit-demo/tree/main/src/components)
- [Views](https://github.com/cocodedk/aura-recruit-demo/tree/main/src/views)
- [README](https://github.com/cocodedk/aura-recruit-demo/blob/main/README.md)
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/cocodedk/aura-recruit-demo/blob/main/CLAUDE.md)

## Stack

- Vue 3 (Composition API), TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Vitest (unit tests), GitHub Pages deployment
